title: Contact — Uma Kumaran
headings: h2: Need to discuss your situation? Want to share your views and help shape my work?
text_excerpt: Contact — Uma Kumaran 0 Skip to Content About me Newsletter Working hard for Stratford & Bow Speaking up in Parliament Policy Survey Contact Open Menu Close Menu About me Newsletter Working hard for Stratford & Bow Speaking up in Parliament Policy Survey Contact Open Menu Close Menu About me Newsletter Working hard for Stratford & Bow Speaking up in Parliament Policy Survey Contact Contact me Need to discuss your situation? Want to share your views and help shape my work? The quickest way to contact me is by email at uma.kumaran.mp@parliament.uk Speak to my office by calling 020 7219 7777 Write to me at: House of Commons, London SW1A 0AA. Please include your: Full name Full Address and Postcode (Stratford and Bow) Information about the problem you’re facing. My team and I can only help if you provide all this information as, with in line with parliamentary protocol, I can only make representations on behalf of those living in Stratford and Bow. Find out if I am your MP here . How I can help Note: If your issue relates to an ongoing enquiry or complaint with an independent body, organisation or agency please note that I cannot intervene or help until all their complaints and appeals processes have been exhausted. What I Can Do: ✅ I can raise matters which impact the constituency on your behalf in the House of Commons. ✅ I can write to relevant departments or officials on your behalf to aid in enquiries or complaints if necessary. ✅ I can write to secretaries of state and other ministers regarding relevant issues once all other channels of enquiry or complaint have been exhausted. What I Can’t Do: ❌ I cannot help in settling disputes between family members, neighbours, or between yourself and an employer. ❌ I cannot give legal advice or interfere in court cases or any decisions previously made in a court of law. ❌ I cannot provide any financial or business advice. Privacy policy Privacy policy Promoted by Aline Delawa on behalf of Uma Kumaran, both at 57-59 Great Suffolk Street, SE1 0BB Office standards Office standards
